FILE(S): Alignment (final and EVAA cycle files) 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 
Null/missing 

COMMENT: The (beneficiary) Enrollment, Validation, Alignment, and Adjudication (EVAA) analysis was performed 
by the Million Hearts data contractor. The Million Hearts model employed a complex EVAA analytic 
process. During this process, each beneficiary record submitted by providers to the Million Hearts 
registry was validated against claims data, and beneficiary
